ats_utilities.config_io.processor.iconfig_processor module¶

Module

iconfig_processor.py

Info

Defines abstract class IConfigProcessor with method(s). Creates an interface for processing configuration content. 1th level of configuration loader/storer interface.

class ats_utilities.config_io.processor.iconfig_processor.IConfigProcessor[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class IConfigProcessor with method(s). Creates an interface for processing configuration content. 1th level of configuration loader/storer interface.

It defines:

methods:
deserialize - Loads and parses configuration from a raw source (string, stream, or lines).
serialize - Converts the internal configuration structure back to a formatted string representation.
update_data - Updates the internal configuration data and validates it against the scheme.
to_dict - Returns the parsed configuration as a flat or structured dictionary.
validate_by_scheme - Validates the internal parsed data structure against the provided scheme.
__str__ - Returns the configuration processor as string representation.

Understanding the scheme Parameter¶

The scheme is a Mapping of str to str that defines the expected structure, required keys, and locations of configuration data. It serves as the source of truth for both parsing (to_dict) and validation (validate_by_scheme).

The concrete format of the scheme depends on the implementation of the processor (flat, section-based, or hierarchical). Refer to the specific processor class documentation for concrete examples.

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract deserialize(content: Any) → bool[source]¶

Loads and parses configuration from a raw source (string, stream, or lines).

Parameters:

content (<Any>) – Raw configuration data (str, stream, or sequence).

Returns:

<True> if successful, <False> otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract serialize() → str[source]¶

Converts the internal configuration structure back to a formatted string representation.

Returns:

Configuration content as string.

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract to_dict() → dict[str, str][source]¶

Returns the parsed configuration as a flat or structured dictionary.

Returns:

Dictionary with configuration information.

Return type:

<dict[str, str]>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract update_data(new_data: Mapping[str, str]) → bool[source]¶

Updates the internal configuration data and validates it against the scheme.

Parameters:

new_data (<Mapping[str, str]>) – Mapping containing configuration keys and values.

Returns:

<True> if successful, <False> otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract validate_by_scheme() → bool[source]¶

Validates the internal parsed data structure against the provided scheme.

Returns:

<True> if data matches the scheme, <False> otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.
